movie.actors: Hadley Kay, Chris Wiggins, Cree Summer, Alyson Court
movie.genre: Animation, Adventure, Comedy, Family, Fantasy, Musical
movie.plot: In this second installment to the original Care Bear Movie trilogy of the 1980s, the Care Bear Family goes on their first Caring Mission--to stop the evil doings of a demon villain, named ...
movie.title: Care Bears Movie II: A New Generation
